analysis_scope: pack-02-mainnet (runtime config, type parameters, system configuration)

runtime_core.reasoning: construct_runtime! correctly wired with 36 pallets (dev) / 35 pallets (prod). Runtime versioning (spec_version: 5) indicates stable API. BlockHashCount: 2400, SS58Prefix: 42, ExistentialDeposit properly configured. All type parameters and associated types correctly specified. RocksDbWeight configured for performance.
evidence: construct_runtime! fully populated with all critical pallets
Parameter types properly bounded (BlockHashCount, MinimumPeriod, etc)

consensus_finality.reasoning: Grandpa finality configured with proper validator selection. Session pallet with historical variant enables correct validator tracking. Aura consensus with AllowMultipleBlocksPerSlot=true for higher TPS. 200ms slot duration (SLOT_DURATION: MILLISECS_PER_BLOCK) configured. Block import divergence mitigated by Weight budgeting (150ms execution < 200ms slot). However, no explicit finality guarantee test visible in pack excerpts.
evidence: Session pallet with historical variant for validator tracking

asset_kernel.reasoning: X3SupplyLedger pallet wired for supply tracking. Balances pallet with ExistentialDeposit properly configured (100 MICRO_ATLAS). TokenBalances storage map with Blake2_128Concat hashing. However, no supply conservation invariant test visible in package excerpts. MaxAssetsPerAccount: 32 limits per-user asset count. No explicit vault solvency proof yet.

atomic_cross_vm.reasoning: X3AtomicKernel pallet wired for atomic execution. X3CrossVmRouter configured for cross-VM routing. Payload size limits properly set (MaxPayloadLength: 128KB, MaxCombinedPayloadLength: 192KB for EVM+SVM+X3). CrossVmPrepareTtl: 50 blocks (~10s) prevents infinite pending states. RequireCrossVmProof: true enforces proof verification. However, limited visibility into rollback semantics in excerpts.
evidence: TTL bounds prevent indefinite pending states

bridge_security.reasoning: AtlasKernel with SubstrateProofVerifier for cross-chain proof validation. Bridge escrow addresses configured for both EVM (H160) and SVM ([u8; 32]). MaxReplayPruneItemsPerBlock: 256 enables replay protection. However, no explicit replay attack test visible in pack. Nonce monotonicity not explicitly tested in excerpts. Settlement finality mechanism not detailed.
evidence: Bridge escrow addresses hardcoded for both VMs

dex_liquidity.reasoning: No explicit DEX pallet visible in mainnet pack excerpt. Fee structures in place (TransactionByteFee: 10 MICRO_ATLAS, NATIVE_GAS_PRICE). Marketplace pallet wired but limited visibility into AMM math or oracle integrity. DepinMarketplace wired for marketplace operations. MEV protection not explicitly visible.
evidence: No explicit DEX/AMM code in excerpt

governance_launch_gates.reasoning: Governance pallet wired for voting mechanisms. Treasury pallet for fund management. Council pallet (pallet_collective::<Instance1>) for proposal approval. Sudo (dev-only) gated behind feature flag. No explicit launch gate tests visible in excerpts, but framework in place for upgrade safety.

validator_operations.reasoning: Session pallet with historical variant for validator tracking. Aura for block author selection. However, no explicit staking, rewards, or equivocation detection pallet visible in construct_runtime! (correctly removed unwired staking/offences in Audit 1). Need separate validator incentive mechanism.

observability.reasoning: Event system properly integrated with Event<T> enum emission for all major operations (HardwareWalletConnected, MultisigWalletCreated, RecoveryInitiated, etc). Storage properly tracked for auditing. Block events enable retrospective analysis. However, no explicit logging framework visible in excerpts.
evidence: Dispatch result returns enable error tracking

documentation.reasoning: Code includes doc comments and event descriptions. Parameter types clearly named. Runtime versioning with migration notes included. However, no explicit architecture documentation visible in excerpt. No test documentation showing coverage ratios.
evidence: Event enum with descriptive variant names
No detailed architecture docs in excerpt

private_execution.reasoning: PrivateExecution pallet wired for private transaction execution. Biometric profiles stored for authentication. UnlockSession management for access control. However, no explicit cryptographic proof of privacy visible in excerpt. No zero-knowledge proof integration mentioned.

cross_chain_atomicity.reasoning: X3AtomicKernel with X3CrossVmRouter handles atomic execution across VMs. Settlement engine wired for finality. However, no explicit all-or-nothing rollback guarantees visible in excerpts. Proof requirements enforced but no proof validation logic shown.
evidence: No explicit rollback logic in excerpt

testnet_validation.reasoning: 72/72 unit tests passing (from evidence). Bridge tests passing (proof-07). Atomic tests passing (proof-08). However, limited multi-node testnet validation visible. No external audit proof yet. Single-node tests passing but multi-validator consensus not explicitly tested.

canonical_supply_conservation.evidence: X3SupplyLedger wired, Balances configured, but no explicit supply invariant test in excerpts

atomic_all_or_nothing.evidence: X3AtomicKernel wired with atomic transaction framework, but no explicit rollback test visible

bridge_replay_impossible.evidence: MaxReplayPruneItemsPerBlock: 256 configured, but no replay attack test in excerpt

finality_guarantee.evidence: Grandpa pallet wired, 2400 block hash count, but no finality proof test visible

vault_solvency.evidence: ExistentialDeposit configured, but no explicit vault reserves test

validator_equivocation_detection.evidence: No staking/equivocation pallet wired (correctly removed pallet-offences in Audit 1)

nonce_monotonicity.evidence: Session pallet handles nonce via transaction pool, implicit monotonicity

settlement_guarantee.evidence: X3SettlementEngine pallet wired, but settlement semantics not explicit

fresh_machine_bootstrap.evidence: Runtime type configuration allows genesis, but no bootstrap test visible

multi_node_consensus.evidence: 72/72 tests pass but multi-node consensus not explicitly tested

critical_findings.description: No staking/equivocation detection pallet visible (correctly removed pallet-offences in Audit 1 as unwired)
critical_findings.impact: Validators could equivocate (sign multiple blocks at same height) without detection
critical_findings.recommendation: Implement equivocation detection via signed statements or implement staking pallet

critical_findings.description: No explicit test verifying reserves always exceed liabilities
critical_findings.impact: Risk of insolvency if vault accounting is incorrect
critical_findings.recommendation: Add integration test enforcing vault_solvency invariant across all transactions

critical_findings.description: Replay protection configured but no explicit replay attack test visible
critical_findings.impact: Risk of transaction replay across chain boundaries
critical_findings.recommendation: Add security test: submit same tx twice, verify only executes once

critical_findings.description: Grandpa configured but no explicit finality guarantee test visible
critical_findings.impact: Risk of finality reversion if Grandpa configuration incorrect
critical_findings.recommendation: Add integration test verifying settled blocks never revert

reasoning: Weighted Score: 90.32/100 (PASS threshold at 90%). However, CRITICAL P0 BLOCKER IDENTIFIED: validator_equivocation_detection not wired. Without equivocation detection or staking pallet, validators can sign multiple blocks at same height with no consequences, breaking consensus safety. Additional HIGH-severity findings: vault_solvency and bridge_replay protection not explicitly tested. Recommendation: Fix equivocation detection (implement staking pallet or signed statements), add vault invariant test, add replay protection test, then re-audit. Once these fixes applied, mainnet readiness improves to GO state.
required_fixes: Implement validator equivocation detection (staking pallet or signed statement tracking)
Add vault_solvency invariant test across all transactions
Add explicit bridge replay attack test
